Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The ReadBufferData method attempts to read the requested portion of the captured output buffer and write it to the target buffer.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: SuccessToken ReadBufferData(void* targetBuffer, size_t targetBufferSizeInBytes) const;

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The destination memory to receive the captured data.
The size, in bytes, of the destination memory.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
